Overthinking Music | 174Hz Sarangi Raga Bhairavi | Alpha Wave Calm Session | 1 Hour

description:
When your mind won't stop, trying harder makes it worse. This does the opposite.

One unbroken hour of bowed sarangi (vocal-like Indian string instrument) playing Raga Bhairavi, tuned to 174Hz healing frequency, with a subliminal Alpha wave layer to ease an overactive mind.

No mid-roll ads. No interruptions. Just music.

⏱ Best for:
• Calming an overactive mind
• Anxiety relief
• Mental rest
• Pre-sleep wind-down
tags: overthinking music, sarangi, sarangi music, sarangi meditation, bowed indian instrument, 174Hz music, 174Hz, Alpha waves, Alpha wave music, raga bhairavi, bhairavi raga, calm music, relaxing music, ambient music, background music, meditation music, indian classical music, instrumental music, overthinking music, anxiety relief music, stress relief music, calm anxious mind, music for overthinkers, 1 hour sarangi music, sarangi for overthinking, indian classical sarangi, alpha wave meditation
suno_prompt: Raga Bhairavi sarangi, calm an overactive mind, ambient Indian classical, tanpura drone, vocal-like phrases with long bow sustains, expressive meend slides, gamak vibrato, 65 BPM, alpha wave undercurrent, no percussion, no rhythm, calm and grounding, warm low-frequency hum, seamless loop, instrumental only, solo sarangi with tanpura, early morning mood, deeply calming, no abrupt changes

production_spec.suno_prompt: Raga Bhairavi sarangi, calm an overactive mind, ambient Indian classical, tanpura drone, vocal-like phrases with long bow sustains, expressive meend slides, gamak vibrato, 65 BPM, alpha wave undercurrent, no percussion, no rhythm, calm and grounding, warm low-frequency hum, seamless loop, instrumental only, solo sarangi with tanpura, early morning mood, deeply calming, no abrupt changes
production_spec.suno_strategy: Custom mode → paste prompt → style: Ambient → generate 2 songs → pick better → click Extend 3-4× to reach ~10-12 min. Generate a second seed with same prompt → extend → ~10 min. Total: ~20 min source. Loop in post to fill 60 min.
suno_critical_tips: Use Custom mode (not simple) so the full prompt is honored
Style: Ambient (best for raga + drone combos)
Generate 6-8 versions, use only the best 2-3
Use 'Extend' for continuity across the source
If Suno adds vocals despite prompt: regenerate (don't add 'no vocals' — it sometimes triggers them)

drone.instrument: Tanpura tuned to root of Raga Bhairavi

production_spec.merge_pattern: ffmpeg -y -loop 1 -i thumbnail.png -i final_audio.wav -c:v libx264 -tune stillimage -preset medium -c:a aac -b:a 320k -ar 48000 -pix_fmt yuv420p -t 3600 -movflags +faststart output.mp4
